questions.question: Is Wi-Fi available inside the apartment?
questions.answer: Yes. Complimentary Wi-Fi is available. The apartment shares the resort Wi-Fi network and the password will be provided on the day of check-in.

questions.question: Does the apartment have air conditioning?
questions.answer: Yes. Air conditioning is available in both the bedroom and living room.

questions.question: How many beds are in the apartment?
questions.answer:
The apartment comfortably accommodates up to three guests.

Bedroom: One king-size bed.

Living Room: One sofa/twin-size bed.

questions.question: Is there a kitchen?
questions.answer: Yes. The apartment has a fully equipped kitchen for guests who wish to prepare meals.

questions.question: Will we have access to the resort?
questions.answer: Yes. Guests have access to beaches, pool, tennis court, basketball court and other resort areas. Some services require additional payment through the Front Desk.

questions.question: Are restaurants available on the property?
questions.answer: Yes. The resort restaurant is managed by Franklyn D Resort. Guests may purchase an All-Inclusive package for USD $150 per person per day including breakfast, lunch, dinner and beverages.

questions.question: How do I request housekeeping?
questions.answer: Daily housekeeping is not included. Additional housekeeping can be arranged through the host for USD $59 per request.

questions.question: How do I arrange laundry?
questions.answer:
T&S Elite Laundry & Cleaning Services provides wash, dry, iron, dry cleaning, pickup and drop-off.

Telephone: (876)574-9631

Address: Shop #12 Mom's Village Plaza, Runaway Bay, St. Ann.
